framework.name: Visa User Intent Capture
framework.description: Visa has a specific 'user intent capture' tool as part of their agentic commerce stack. This appears to be their analog to Mastercard's Verifiable Intent but the implementation is human-confirmation-based rather than cryptographic-signature-based.
framework.raw_quote: authentication, agentic tokenization, and user intent capture

source.title: Introducing Visa Intelligent Commerce on AWS: Enabling agentic commerce with Amazon Bedrock AgentCore | Artificial Intelligence
